# subbandParameters

**Instance Property**

An array of frequencies that describe varying sound emission across the spectrum.

## Declaration

```swift
var subbandParameters: [PHASEConeDirectivityModelSubbandParameters] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property is read only. The framework sets the value to the argument you supply the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEConeDirectivityModelParameters/init(subbandParameters:)] initializer.
title: subbandParameters
